name: Snail Omelette
recipeInstructions:
Preparation time 15 minutes. Cooking time 1 hour.
1. Starve the snails and clean them well.
2. Cook the snails for 1 hour in boiling water with added salt, fennel, and a dried fig leaf. Drain and remove from shells.
3. Prepare omelette mixture: Beat egg yolks and fold in stiffly beaten whites.
4. Make an omelette using the prepared mixture.
5. Fill the omelette with snails.
6. Serve with red or white wine from Haut-Poitou, Anjou, or Touraine regions.
